success_criteria: scripts/run-validator-b.mjs exists and can execute in dry-run mode without invoking Gemini.
Validator-B runner rejects handoffs with agent values other than Validator-B.
Validator-B runner performs common secret-like payload preflight before invoking a model CLI.
Harness audit includes Validator-B pipeline checks.
known_risks: Gemini CLI is not installed in the current local environment, so live execution may produce Resource Failure until configured.
Validator-B must stay independent from Validator-A results in Tier 3.
forbidden_context: Do not include other validator result artifacts in this handoff.
Do not include secrets, credentials, API keys, tokens, or PII.
Do not ask Validator-B to modify files or merge branches.
